assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: The response upgrades node pools first (coordinating, data, master) and only upgrades the control plane as the final Phase 4 step

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Clearly specifies coordinating→data→master upgrade order with rationale that coordinating nodes are safest first since they don't store data

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Mentions regional PD attachment taking longer but doesn't specifically explain that regional pd-ssd can reattach across zones for upgrade safety

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Explicitly creates PDB with minAvailable=2 for master nodes and explains it maintains quorum of 2 out of 3

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Uses maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=1 for upgrades, not the more conservative maxUnavailable=0

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Includes cluster health checks throughout the process and specifically checks for green status in post-upgrade verification

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Does not mention checking or setting PV reclaim policy to Retain

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Provides monitoring commands for nodes and pods but doesn't include specific kubectl rollout status commands for StatefulSets

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Includes creating a backup snapshot in the pre-upgrade preparation section with specific curl command
